design_philosophy: A grounded, stress-free operating system for freelancers. Relies on warm earth tones to create a sense of trust and calmness around finances, with precise high-contrast typography for readability. Breaks standard SaaS flatness with optical clarity and generous spacing.

shadows.sm: shadowColor: '#1A1C19', shadowOffset: { width: 0, height: 2 }, shadowOpacity: 0.05, shadowRadius: 8, elevation: 2

buttons.primary: BackgroundColor: #2C5545, BorderRadius: 12, PaddingVertical: 16, PaddingHorizontal: 24. Flex center. Text: #FFFFFF, Outfit_600SemiBold, 16px.
buttons.secondary: BackgroundColor: #F0F0EB, BorderRadius: 12, PaddingVertical: 16, PaddingHorizontal: 24. Flex center. Text: #1A1C19.
buttons.fab: Absolute positioning (bottom 24px, right 24px). BackgroundColor: #2C5545. Width/Height: 56px. BorderRadius: 28px. Shadow for depth. Z-index: 50.

cards.dashboard_kpi: BackgroundColor: #FFFFFF, BorderRadius: 16, Padding: 16, BorderWidth: 1, BorderColor: #E5E5E0. Layout: Icon + Title row, followed by large Value text ('AED 4,500').
cards.list_item: BackgroundColor: #FFFFFF, BorderRadius: 16, Padding: 16, MarginBottom: 12, BorderWidth: 1, BorderColor: #E5E5E0. Flex row space-between.
cards.kanban_card: BackgroundColor: #FFFFFF, BorderRadius: 12, Padding: 16, BorderWidth: 1, BorderColor: #E5E5E0. Left-aligned text. MarginBottom: 12.

inputs.text_input: BackgroundColor: #FFFFFF, BorderWidth: 1, BorderColor: #E5E5E0, BorderRadius: 12, PaddingHorizontal: 16, PaddingVertical: 14. Text: 16px Manrope_400Regular. Focus state: BorderColor: #2C5545.
inputs.search_bar: BackgroundColor: #F0F0EB, BorderRadius: 12, PaddingHorizontal: 16, PaddingVertical: 12. Flex row items-center. BorderWidth: 0.

navigation.bottom_tab: BackgroundColor: #FFFFFF, BorderTopWidth: 1, BorderTopColor: #E5E5E0, PaddingTop: 8, PaddingBottom: 24. Active icon tint: #2C5545, Inactive: #A3B19B.
navigation.header: BackgroundColor: #F9F9F6, PaddingTop: 48, PaddingBottom: 16, PaddingHorizontal: 24. Flex row space-between items-center. Z-index: 50.

badges.paid: BackgroundColor: #E8F3E9, PaddingHorizontal: 8, PaddingVertical: 4, BorderRadius: 6. Text: #1E3F20, 12px, Manrope_600SemiBold, Uppercase.
badges.overdue: BackgroundColor: #FCECEC, PaddingHorizontal: 8, PaddingVertical: 4, BorderRadius: 6. Text: #A94438, 12px, Manrope_600SemiBold, Uppercase.
badges.pending: BackgroundColor: #FFF4E5, PaddingHorizontal: 8, PaddingVertical: 4, BorderRadius: 6. Text: #B36B00, 12px, Manrope_600SemiBold, Uppercase.

screens.name: Auth
screens.layout: Vertical stack, centered content. Top: Brand Logo 'Lancely' (Outfit_700Bold, large). Middle: Input forms (Email, Password) with 16px gap. Bottom: Primary Login CTA. Background: #F9F9F6.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.layout: ScrollView. Header: 'Hello, [Name]' + Avatar. Section 1: 2-column grid for KPIs (Active Clients, Projects). Section 2: Full-width high-contrast card for 'Revenue This Month'. Section 3: 'Pending/Overdue Invoices' horizontal ScrollView.

screens.name: Clients List
screens.layout: Header with 'Add Client' plus button. Search bar sticky below header. FlatList of clients (Avatar, Name, Recent Project, Status tag).

screens.name: Client Profile
screens.layout: Top section: Contact info and quick actions (Email, Call) in secondary buttons. Tabbed view or stacked sections below: Projects, Quotes, Invoices related to client.

screens.name: Quote & Invoice Generator
screens.layout: Form ScrollView. Client selector dropdown. Line items section with 'Add Item' text button. Total calculation fixed at the bottom above a full-width 'Generate' Primary CTA.

screens.name: Project Kanban
screens.layout: Horizontal ScrollView containing vertical columns (Lead, Proposal, In Progress, Review, Completed). Each column has a fixed width (e.g., 85% of screen width) so the next column visually peeks out to suggest swiping. Vertical ScrollView inside each column for cards.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a testID attribute.
